ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model (e.g., Logistic Regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its use case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tested */,
  "bootstrap" INTEGER /* Indicates if bootstrap is used (true/false) */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for the experiment */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Type of distribution utilized in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., 'running', 'completed', 'failed') */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text field for any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with these metrics */,
  "test_average_precision" REAL /* Test average precision score */,
  "test_roc_auc" REAL /* Test ROC AUC score */,
  "train_average_precision" REAL /* Training average precision score */,
  "train_roc_auc" REAL /* Training ROC AUC score */,
  "validation_average_precision" REAL /* Validation average precision score */,
  "validation_roc_auc" REAL /* Validation ROC AUC score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who recorded the metrics */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metrics */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the metrics */,
  "f1_score_test" REAL /* F1 score for the test set */,
  "f1_score_train" REAL /* F1 score for the training set */,
  "f1_score_validation" REAL /* F1 score for the validation set */,
  "accuracy_test" REAL /* Accuracy for the test set */,
  "accuracy_train" REAL /* Accuracy for the training set */,
  "accuracy_validation" REAL /* Accuracy for the validation set */,
  "precision_test" REAL /* Precision for the test set */,
  "precision_train" REAL /* Precision for the training set */,
  "precision_validation" REAL /* Precision for the validation set */,
  "recall_test" REAL /* Recall for the test set */,
  "recall_train" REAL /* Recall for the training set */,
  "recall_validation" REAL /* Recall for the validation set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment run by the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text field for any additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., URL, local file path) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_datasets" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment using the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "dataset_id")
)
